_comment: Everything here is OPTIONAL. The dashboard auto-detects states, village types, statuses, and sales teams from your data. Use this only to control order, labels, or colors. Leave arrays empty to use pure auto-detect.

statuses._comment: The status values your salesmen submit. Auto-detected if empty. Order here = display order.

villageTypes._comment: Auto-detected if empty. Order here = display order. Add DHQ if your data uses it.

states._comment: Leave empty to auto-detect from data. Pin here to force order or hide states.

auditThresholds._comment: A town is 'audit completed' when this fraction of its parties are visited.
